positive: A vibrant, stylized neon-noir illustration of a mythical winged griffin perched on a crystalline outcrop overlooking a stylized, retro-futuristic cityscape at twilight. The griffin has sharp, geometric contours and glows with internal sapphire and emerald light, contrasting against the deep indigo and burnt orange sky. Emphasize strong, clean silhouettes and bold line work, reminiscent of 80s synthwave aesthetics. The composition must be centrally balanced, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Cinematic lighting, dramatic highlights, volumetric mist, graphic novel style, minimalist composition.
negative: low detail, blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, gradient, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, dirty, photorealistic, monochrome
